diff:
diff --git a/src/network.py b/src/network.py
index 7540f16..bb27bff 100644
--- a/src/network.py
+++ b/src/network.py
@@ -1,7 +1,25 @@
 def parse_host_port(value: str, default_port: int = 80) -> tuple[str, int]:
-    host, sep, port_text = value.partition(":")
-    if not sep:
-        return value, default_port
-    if port_text == "":
-        return host, default_port
-    return host, int(port_text)
+    if value.startswith('['):
+        # Handle bracketed IPv6 addresses
+        end_bracket = value.find(']')
+        if end_bracket == -1:
+            raise ValueError("Invalid bracketed IPv6 address")
+        host = value[1:end_bracket]
+        remainder = value[end_bracket + 1:]
+        if remainder.startswith(':'):
+            port_text = remainder[1:]
+            if port_text == "":
+                port = default_port
+            else:
+                port = int(port_text)
+        else:
+            port = default_port
+        return host, port
+    else:
+        # Handle normal host:port
+        host, sep, port_text = value.partition(":")
+        if not sep:
+            return value, default_port
+        if port_text == "":
+            return host, default_port
+        return host, int(port_text)
